fixtures.input: Polish this LaTeX without changing its technical meaning: As shown in \ref{fig:overview}, our score is $s=x^T y$ \cite{smith2024}. \label{sec:method}
required_outcomes: Preserves every citation, reference, formula, and label exactly
Preserves the technical claim while improving paper prose

fixtures.input: Run the final redline on this internally consistent excerpt: We evaluate both methods on the same held-out test set. Method A reaches 82.1% accuracy and Method B reaches 80.4%, so Method A is higher by 1.7 percentage points.
required_outcomes: Returns [检测通过，无实质性问题]
Does not invent stylistic findings merely to produce feedback

fixtures.input: Analyze only this supplied table: Method A: Accuracy 82.1, F1 79.0. Method B: Accuracy 80.4, F1 80.2. Do not infer causes or unreported experiments.
required_outcomes: Every reported number and trend is supported by the supplied table
Does not invent baselines, significance, causes, experiments, or conclusions

fixtures.input: Review this excerpt: Section 3 says the model uses no external data, but Section 4 reports pretraining on Dataset X without explanation. Report substantive findings by priority.
required_outcomes: Every P0 or P1 finding identifies its location
Every P0 or P1 finding states the risk
Every P0 or P1 finding proposes a concrete executable fix
